sentence: O ceo nun esta claru güei.
ipa: o θeo nun esta klaɾu ɡwei
gloss_en: The sky is not clear today.
notes: Predorsal <c> before front vowel [θ] 'ceo' and 'güei' (< today) per frias_conde_sanabria; final atonic -o>-u 'claru' per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: Estos çapatos cuostan cuarenta euros.
ipa: estos θapatos kwostan kwaɾenta ewɾos
gloss_en: These shoes cost forty euros.
notes: Tonic Ŏ>/wo/ 'cuostan' (more archaic than Castilian /we/) per frias_conde_sanabria, p.3; ç>[θ] per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: La xunta ye manhana a las tres.
ipa: la ʃunta ʝe maɲana a las tɾes
gloss_en: The gathering is tomorrow at three.
notes: <x> [ʃ] 'xunta' (four-way sibilant system /s ʃ θ tʃ/) and copula 'ye' per frias_conde_sanabria; palatal <nh> [ɲ] per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: El miou irmao bibe cerca del riu.
ipa: el mjou iɾmao biβe θeɾka del rju
gloss_en: My brother lives near the river.
notes: Masc. article 'el' and betacism 'bibe' (< vive) per garcia_arias2003; word-initial trill [r] 'riu' per frias_conde_sanabria.

sentence: Bai en frente i tuorce pela primeira caleya.
ipa: baj en fɾente i twoɾθe pela pɾimejɾa kaleʝa
gloss_en: Go straight ahead and turn on the first lane.
notes: Tonic Ŏ>/wo/ 'tuorce' and <-eiro/-eira> outcome 'primeira' per frias_conde_sanabria; -LJ- > [ʝ] 'caleya' per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: La sopa de peixe estaba mui saborosa.
ipa: la sopa de pejʃe estaβa mwi saβoɾosa
gloss_en: The fish soup was very tasty.
notes: <ei> 'peixe' and imperfect -aba per frias_conde_sanabria; coda [s] not [ʃ] (no chiado) and no vowel reduction per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: Onde cueyo el coche?
ipa: onde kweʝo el kotʃe
gloss_en: Where do I take the coach?
notes: Tonic Ŏ>/wo/ 'cueyo' [kwe-]? -LJ->[ʝ] 'cueyo' (< I take) per garcia_arias2003; <ch> [tʃ] 'coche' per frias_conde_sanabria.

sentence: Cuantas personas bienen a cenar?
ipa: kwantas peɾsonas bjenen a θenaɾ
gloss_en: How many people are coming to supper?
notes: Diphthong <ie> [je] 'bienen' with preserved -n as a consonant (no PT nasal vowel) per frias_conde_sanabria; predorsal <c> [θ] 'cenar' per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: Se you podiera, mercaba aquela casa.
ipa: se ʝow poðjeɾa meɾkaβa akela kasa
gloss_en: If I could, I would buy that house.
notes: 1sg pronoun 'you' [ʝow] and imperfect -aba per frias_conde_sanabria; 'mercar' (< to buy) per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: Mercamos figos i berças na feira.
ipa: meɾkamos fiɣos i beɾθas na fejɾa
gloss_en: We bought figs and greens at the fair.
notes: F- retention 'figos' [f] per frias_conde_sanabria, p.4; betacism 'berças' and <ei> 'feira' per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: Manhana imos de barcu ata la ribeira.
ipa: maɲana imos de baɾku ata la riβejɾa
gloss_en: Tomorrow we go by boat to the riverside.
notes: Palatal <nh> [ɲ] 'manhana' and <-eira> 'ribeira' per garcia_arias2003; word-initial trill [r] 'ribeira' per frias_conde_sanabria.

sentence: Chama-me cuando chegares a casa.
ipa: tʃama me kwando tʃeɣaɾes a kasa
gloss_en: Call me when you get home.
notes: PL-/KL-/FL- > <ch> [tʃ] 'chama' (< clamare) per frias_conde_sanabria, p.4; -n preserved 'cuando' (no nasal vowel) per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: Buonas tardes, como te ba la cousa?
ipa: bwonas taɾdes komo te ba la kowsa
gloss_en: Good afternoon, how are things with you?
notes: Tonic Ŏ>/wo/ 'buonas' and betacism 'ba' (< vai) per frias_conde_sanabria; retained <ou> 'cousa' per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: Mais bal un paxaru na mano que dous bolando.
ipa: majs bal un paʃaɾu na mano ke dows bolando
gloss_en: A bird in the hand is worth two in the bush.
notes: Betacism 'bal'/'bolando' and <x> [ʃ] 'paxaru' per garcia_arias2003; retained <ou> 'dous' and intervocalic -n- 'mano' per frias_conde_sanabria.

sentence: El gatu ñegro duorme cabo del lhume.
ipa: el ɡatu ɲeɡɾo dwoɾme kaβo del ʎume
gloss_en: The black cat sleeps by the fire.
notes: Initial N- > [ɲ] 'ñegro' per frias_conde_sanabria, p.4; tonic Ŏ>/wo/ 'duorme' per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: Aquel ratu fugiu pa el buracu.
ipa: akel ratu fuʒju pa el buɾaku
gloss_en: That mouse fled into the hole.
notes: Word-initial trill [r] 'ratu' and final atonic -u ('ratu','buracu') per garcia_arias2003; masc. article 'el' per frias_conde_sanabria.

sentence: Todu el mundo fala deste feito.
ipa: toðu el mundo fala deste fejto
gloss_en: The whole world talks about this deed.
notes: /kt/>/it/ 'feito' [ejt] per frias_conde_sanabria, p.4; F- retention 'fala' and final -u 'todu' per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: Ye mui lludio cuando bebe.
ipa: ʝe mwi ʎuðjo kwando beβe
gloss_en: He is very tiresome when he drinks.
notes: Initial L- > [ʎ] 'lludio' (< all Latin initial L- palatalises) per frias_conde_sanabria, p.4; /b/ retained 'bebe' per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: La lluz del sol relluz por riba de las llombas.
ipa: la ʎuθ del sol reʎuθ poɾ riβa de las ʎombas
gloss_en: The light of the sun shines over the hills.
notes: Initial and -LL- > [ʎ] 'lluz','relluz','llombas' per frias_conde_sanabria, p.4; coda /l/ 'sol' and trill onset [r] per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: El moliñeiro coye a lluz na ñube.
ipa: el moliɲejɾo koʝe a ʎuθ na ɲuβe
gloss_en: The miller catches the light in the cloud.
notes: -INU > -ñ- 'moliñeiro' and <-eiro> suffix per frias_conde_sanabria, p.4; initial N- > [ɲ] 'ñube' per garcia_arias2003.
